smoke.detail: pixi run pytest endpoints/metabolism/test_aggregate.py -q => 14 passed. Synthetic SMARTCyp (low Score on atom k) + FAME3R (high prob on atom k) => ordinal rank-sum co-rank puts atom k top for both, models_agree True, confidence high; a magnitude test proves only integer ranks are summed (raw Score/probability never averaged, F-2); disagreement on the top atom raises the confidence flag (low). Stability and SoM stay two separate quantities; the two ADMET-AI CLint heads are separate labeled low-weight candidates (F-17, never combined); the ADMETlab head is a NEEDS_AARAN placeholder excluded from the derived flag.

note: metabolism aggregator: TWO quantities not three votes - whole-molecule stability (qualitative, low-weight) kept separate from per-atom SoM ORDINAL co-rank (rank-sum on atom index; SMARTCyp Score and FAME3R prob never averaged, F-2); confidence = SoM inter-model agreement cross-referenced with stability.
